ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the data was collected */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The team the user is associated with (optional) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* A more detailed access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Season during which the data was collected
Type of season (e.g., regular season, playoffs)
Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western)
Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific)
City where the team is based
Timestamp of the last update to the team's data
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin)
The team the user is associated with (optional)
A more detailed access level (e.g., read, write, admin)
